package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_algorithmic_complexity_recursive_graph_walk_without_seen_set: Layer: Algorithmic complexity. Flag recursive graph or tree walks that do not track visited nodes for cyclic or shared inputs.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule501PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario501Positive(records []Rule501PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
